_comment: Per-million-token USD prices for the apply-fix candidate ladder. Authoritative source: the `claude-api` skill's Current Models table (cached 2026-06-24). Update these when prices change; the harness computes cost = tokens x price from this file, so a stale entry silently skews the model x cost matrix.

claude-sonnet-5._intro: 2.00/10.00 per MTok through 2026-08-31; sticker used here for stable baselines
